bugs.title: ListChatSessions returns messageCount=0 despite 12 messages
bugs.description: ListChatSessions returns a session with messageCount=0, but GetChatHistory for the same session returns 12 messages. The messageCount field appears to not be populated or tracked.
bugs.expected: messageCount should reflect actual message count (12)

ux_issues.description: The itinerary creation was split across two tool calls (days 1-7, then days 8-10) within the same response. While the AI handled it gracefully, it created a brief moment where the itinerary appeared incomplete in the stream. Users on slower connections might see a partial itinerary before the second batch arrives.
ux_issues.suggestion: Consider batching all items in a single create_itinerary_items call when the AI has planned the full trip.

ai_behavior_issues.issue: The wildlife expert (Elena) response was oddly brief and self-correcting, saying 'You are absolutely right to point that out! My apologies for the confusion. The Arenal Frog Pond Visit is indeed already in your itinerary for Day 3.' — but the user never corrected the AI. The Frog Pond was added by the expert herself in the same response chain. The expert seemed confused about whether an item she just added was already there.
ai_behavior_issues.context: Step 3c: Asked about wildlife watching for kids and expert handoff. The suggest_expert tool fired and Elena the nature/family expert was introduced. She added an Arenal Frog Pond item to day 3, then in her final text incorrectly implied the user had pointed this out.

ai_behavior_issues.issue: The AI did not ask clarifying questions about dietary restrictions before making restaurant recommendations, as specified in the persona test criteria. Restaurante Travesia was recommended without asking about food allergies or preferences for the kids.
ai_behavior_issues.context: Step 6a: Companion mode, asked for dinner recommendation in La Fortuna. The persona spec says 'The AI should ask clarifying questions about...dietary restrictions before finalizing recommendations.'

usefulness_evaluation.narrative: The AI created a well-structured 10-day Costa Rica family itinerary with age-appropriate activities, realistic driving times (3-4hrs Arenal to Monteverde, 4-5hrs Monteverde to Manuel Antonio), and good safety advice for kids. Context retention was excellent — the AI never re-asked about the destination after trip creation. Medical facility info was specific (Hospital San Carlos, Hospital Max Peralta in Quepos). The expert handoff to Elena worked but produced a slightly confused response. Companion mode responses were appropriately concise and practical. The main miss was not proactively asking about dietary restrictions before recommending restaurants.
